sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70804" key="nhfalieu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νηφᾰλ-ιεύω</orth>, <sense id="n70804.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make a libation without wine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
